old_value: {"id":"ai-harness-anr","title":"Harmonize Beads and GSD workflow guidance","description":"Audit and tighten ai-harness scaffold docs, runtime scripts, and rules so the documented workflow clearly follows Beads -\u003e GSD -\u003e Beads. Cover graceful degradation when bd or .beads is unavailable, phase-level issue tracking expectations, verification-before-close rules, and landing/bootstrap guidance. Note the current gap that no autonomous.md exists in this repo and avoid hard-coding unsupported Beads config keys without version validation.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"natem12@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-29T06:43:51Z","created_by":"ndmikkelsen","updated_at":"2026-03-29T06:43:51Z"}

old_value: {"id":"ai-harness-64p","title":"Decide autonomous.md and Beads config integration strategy","description":"Follow up on the remaining gap between the desired autonomous GSD workflow integration and the current ai-harness scaffold. The repo currently has no autonomous.md surface, and the proposed Beads config key export_to_jsonl does not match the active upstream .beads/config.yaml comments in this environment, which reference events-export instead. Decide whether ai-harness should scaffold a dedicated autonomous workflow doc, how that should coexist with AGENTS.md and .codex docs, and whether post-bd-init config should enable JSONL or event export for automation.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"natem12@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-29T06:47:48Z","created_by":"ndmikkelsen","updated_at":"2026-03-29T06:47:48Z"}

old_value: {"id":"ai-harness-3uw.1","title":"Codify ai-harness doctrine and cleanup contract","description":"Write down the opinionated product doctrine for ai-harness: Beads, GSD, Codex, and OpenCode are the foundation; src/templates/** is canonical; existing repos preserve user files by default; and non-harness AI workflow droppings are only removed through curated manifests. Update the project and planning docs so later cleanup and doctor work has a stable contract to follow.","acceptance_criteria":"The doctrine clearly states what ai-harness installs, what it removes, what it preserves, and which files are the source of truth for dogfooded updates.","spec_id":"phase-2-self-hosted-harness-rollout","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"natem12@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-29T17:42:03Z","created_by":"ndmikkelsen","updated_at":"2026-03-29T17:42:03Z"}

{"id":"ai-harness-3uw.2","title":"Expand curated cleanup manifests for legacy AI workflow droppings","description":"Inventory the non-harness AI workflow leftovers we already know how to reason about, then extend curated cleanup manifests so existing-repo adoption can remove them safely. Keep the scope explicit: legacy wrappers, duplicate planning systems, deprecated assistant runtime files, and other known artifacts that conflict with the ai-harness foundation.","acceptance_criteria":"Curated manifest entries cover the known legacy droppings we want removed, and tests prove they are removed only when explicitly requested.","spec_id":"phase-2-self-hosted-harness-rollout","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"natem12@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-29T17:42:09Z","created_by":"ndmikkelsen","updated_at":"2026-03-29T17:42:09Z"}

new_value: Verified: doctrine now defines the installed foundation, preserve/remove contract, and source-of-truth rules in README.md, docs/ai-harness-premise.md, and .planning/PROJECT.md

old_value: {"id":"ai-harness-3uw.4","title":"Teach doctor to flag deprecated AI workflow artifacts","description":"Improve ai-harness doctor so it can spot deprecated or conflicting workflow artifacts that should not survive alongside the harness foundation. The doctor output should help a user distinguish between missing required harness files, outdated known leftovers, and safe user-owned files that should be preserved.","acceptance_criteria":"Doctor reports deprecated known artifacts with actionable guidance without encouraging broad heuristic deletion of user files.","spec_id":"phase-2-self-hosted-harness-rollout","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"natem12@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-29T17:42:21Z","created_by":"ndmikkelsen","updated_at":"2026-03-29T17:42:21Z"}
